justification.personality: The film largely omits her personality, reducing her to a background mention or a victim.
justification.narrative_role: Her role is significantly diminished or entirely removed from the main narrative thrust of the films.
justification.motivations: Her personal motivations are never explored or established in the films.
justification.character_arc: As she is largely absent or only shown in a single, static context (like a photograph), any arc is nonexistent in the film adaptation.
